A '''firehose''' was a device used by [[Firefighter droid/Legends|firefighter droids]] to extinguish fires that occurred aboard ships.<ref name="Destroy Malevolence">{{TCW|Destroy Malevolence|Destroy ''Malevolence''}}</ref> They were also used in [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]], where the tool consisted of a thick hose which pumped [[Water/Legends|water]] from a large [[Water tower/Legends|water tower]] in the village.<ref name="Night of the Stranger" />

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date note">{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} dates the events of the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] animated series, which include the events of "Night of the Stranger," to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] [[Weechee Warrick|Weechee]] and [[Widdle Warrick/Legends|Willy Warrick]] once used a firehose to put out a fire in Bright Tree Village which had been formed by the [[Stranger]] using the [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]]. The fire threatened to engulf the entire village before the Ewoks were able to extinguish it.<ref name="Night of the Stranger">{{Ewoks|Night of the Stranger}}</ref>
